seo_title: OpenRouter Valuation Doubles to $1.3B in a Year
meta_description: OpenRouter's valuation has more than doubled to $1.3 billion in just one year, driven by its 5x growth in usage over six months.
body_html:
OpenRouter's valuation has more than doubled to $1.3 billion in just one year, driven by its 5x growth in usage over six months.

$113 million Series B led by CapitalG 5x growth in usage over six months Multi-AI-model future indicated

Definition of Investment Investment is traditionally defined as the 'commitment of resources into something expected to gain value over time'

Impact on Job Market and Enterprise Shift Key MetricDescription5x growth in usageIndicates significant increase in OpenRouter's user base over six monthsMulti-AI-model futureSuggests potential for increased adoption of AI-powered search solutions

source.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
source.summary: OpenRouter's valuation has increased from an unspecified amount to $1.3 billion in just one year, following a $113 million investment led by CapitalG. The company has seen a significant surge in usage, with its 5x growth over six months. This indicates a promising future for multi-AI model technology.
